body:
#### PR description:

Backport various MPI-related updates to CMSSW 16.0.x:
  - #50335 by @ghyls 
  - #50432 by @Annnnya 

#### PR validation:

All changes have been validated in the `master` branch.

#### Backport status

Backport various PRs (see above) to CMSSW 16.0.x for NGT online tests.
title: Backport MPI updates to 16.0.x
